title: A woman got a UTI. Two years later, the bacteria had evolved, invaded her brain.
summary: In all, the two urine samples and the brain sample all grew the same bacteria: Klebsiella pneumoniae . The bacteria in the two urine samples differed by 66 small mutations, while the two hypervirulent bacterial samples differed by just four small mutations.
caption: output/2026-07-23/a-woman-got-a-uti-two-years-later-the-bacteria-had-evolved-invaded-her.txt
